function.name: get_latest_report_summary
function.description: Retrieve the latest uploaded blood report summary for the current user.

user_id.description: Optional current authenticated user id, usually injected as assistant metadata or variable value.

function.name: compare_reports
function.description: Compare two uploaded blood reports and explain what improved, worsened, or stayed stable.

function.name: get_marker_recommendation
function.description: Return educational guidance for a marker from a specific report, including food and lifestyle suggestions.

marker_key.description: One of hemoglobin, ferritin, vitamin_b12, vitamin_d_25_oh, fasting_glucose, hba1c, ldl, triglycerides, etc.

function.name: schedule_next_checkup
function.description: Create the next blood checkup event 6 months after the selected report date and remind the user in advance.

report_id.description: The report id used as the baseline date

months_after.description: How many months after the report date to schedule the checkup

reminder_days_before.description: How many days before the appointment the reminder should fire
